Package org.eventb.internal.core.pom

Class POLoader

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.pom.POLoader
public final class POLoader extends Object
This class handles loading and generation of Prover Sequents from PO sequents stored in the database.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    private static class 
    POLoader.NoForall
    Filter for WD predicates that are considered uninteresting.
    private static class 
    POLoader.SelectionHints
    This is a private class that collects selection hints from a PO Sequent.

    • DEBUG

  • Constructor Details

    • POLoader

      private POLoader()

  • Method Details

    • readPO

      public static IProverSequent readPO(IPOSequent poSeq, FormulaFactory factory) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the sequent associated to the given proof obligation.

      The PO file containing the proof obligation to read should be locked before running this method, so that the PO doesn't change while reading it.

      Parameters:
      poSeq - the proof obligation to read
      factory - the formula factory to use
      Returns:
      the sequent of the given proof obligation
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • isWDPO

      private static boolean isWDPO(IPOSequent poSeq)
      Checks if the given IPOSequent is a proof obligation for proving WD of the goal.

      In this case, adding the WD predicate of the goal to the hypotheses can be avoided (see readPO(IPOSequent, FormulaFactory)).

      Parameters:
      poSeq - the sequent to check for
      Returns:
      true iff the given PO is a WD PO.

    • loadHypotheses

      private static void loadHypotheses(IPOSequent poSeq, POLoader.SelectionHints selHints, Set<Predicate> hypotheses, Set<Predicate> selHyps, ITypeEnvironmentBuilder typeEnv, FormulaFactory factory) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Loads the hypotheses of the given PO and appends them to the given set of hypotheses. The given type environment is enriched with the types of the free identifiers that occur in the loaded hypotheses.
      Parameters:
      poSeq - PO to read
      selHints - information regarding hypotheses selection
      hypotheses - set of hypotheses where to store the loaded hypotheses
      selHyps - set of hypotheses where to store the selected loaded hypotheses
      typeEnv - type environment to enrich at the same time
      factory - the formula factory to use
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • loadPredicateSet

      private static void loadPredicateSet(IPOPredicateSet poPredSet, POLoader.SelectionHints selHints, Set<Predicate> hypotheses, Set<Predicate> selHyps, ITypeEnvironmentBuilder typeEnv, FormulaFactory factory) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • readGoal

      private static Predicate readGoal(IPOSequent poSeq, ITypeEnvironment typeEnv, FormulaFactory factory) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Reads the goal of the given proof obligation.
      Parameters:
      poSeq - PO to read
      typeEnv - type environment to use
      factory - the formula factory to use
      Returns:
      the goal of the given PO
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException

    • addWDpredicates

      private static void addWDpredicates(Predicate pred, Set<Predicate> predSet, FormulaFactory ff)
      Adds the WD predicates of the given predicate to the given predicate set in case it should be added (see shouldWDpredBeAdded(Predicate)).

      In case the WD predicate is 'true', this is not added. In case the WD predicate is a conjunction, its conjuncts are added.

      Parameters:
      pred - The predicate whose WD predicate should be added to the given predicate set
      ff - the formula factory to use
      predSet - The predicate set to which this WD predicate should be added

    • shouldWDpredBeAdded

      private static boolean shouldWDpredBeAdded(Predicate pred)
      Filters predicates for whom WD predicates should be added to the hypotheses.

      The condition used here is that the WD predicate shall not contain any universal quantification, because such predicates have a very low probability of being useful.

      Parameters:
      pred - the predicate to filter
      Returns:
      true iff the WD predicate for this predicate should be added to the hypotheses.
      See Also:
      • addWDpredicates(Predicate, Set, FormulaFactory)
